data.name: Furry OwO
data.detailed_description:
Furry OwO is an incredibly exciting game in which you have to solve simple puzzles with big furry boys.

A cute and incredibly exciting game with simple puzzles, relaxing music and a gentle atmosphere will help you relax after a hard day in the company of big furry boys.

Enjoy 9 levels, solve puzzles, each of which is unique and difficult in its own way, and the solution of which will give you an incredible experience and a new exhibit in your personal gallery.

The game contains materials that are not suitable for people of all ages and unacceptable for viewing at work: nudity, sexual materials for adults only.

data.short_description: Furry OwO is an incredibly addictive puzzle game in which your favorite big furry boys are waiting for you.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 Mb
  • 儲存空間: 101 MB 可用空間
